subcodes.first_line: O God! Thou Whose mercy hath encompassed all things, Whose bounty hath been perfected for all creation, and Whose forgiveness hath come to the aid of all who dwell on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من وسعت رحمته کل الاشیاء و کملت نعمته لکل الوری و اغاثت مغفرته اهل الارضین
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for forgiveness, @love of God
